metadata.title: Insights & News | GS1 Saudi Arabia
metadata.description: Latest 2026 updates on SFDA RSD mandates, ZATCA integration, and the Kingdom's roadmap to 2D barcodes.

hero.title: Supply Chain
hero.description: Stay informed with the latest updates on global standards, regulatory mandates, and digital transformation initiatives shaping the future of commerce in Saudi Arabia.

spotlight.title: Spotlight
spotlight.description: Expert analysis on global standards, regulatory compliance, and the future of supply chains in the Kingdom.

items.title: SFDA RSD Update: Veterinary Serialization 2026
items.desc: Mandatory GS1 DataMatrix implementation for all veterinary pharmaceutical products in the Kingdom enters force in Q1 2026.

items.title: KSA to Host UN Global Supply Chain Forum
items.desc: Riyadh has been selected as the 2026 hub to discuss digital trade corridors and GS1's role in the resilience initiative.

items.title: The 2D Sunrise: KSA Retailers Pilot QR Codes
items.desc: Following the GS1 Global Roadmap, major Saudi retailers are now upgrading POS systems to scan GS1 Digital Link by 2027.

items.title: King Faisal Hospital Achieves 99% Traceability
items.excerpt: A landmark achievement in patient safety using GLN (Global Location Numbers) for bedside medication verification.

items.title: ZATCA Phase 2: Wave 22 Integration Guidelines
items.excerpt: New technical requirements for businesses with turnover exceeding 1M SAR to integrate with the Fatoora portal.

items.title: The Future of 'Manih' & GS1 Standards
items.excerpt: How SASO is integrating GS1 identifiers to streamline the issuance of Certificates of Conformity on the SABER platform.

whySection.title: Securing the Saudi Supply Chain
whySection.description: As of 2026, over 10,000 Saudi companies rely on GS1 standards to comply with ZATCA, SFDA, and SASO requirements. Our standards aren't just barcodes—they are the digital language of Vision 2030.
